parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.repoName, private: false, auto_init: true, description: $json.businessName + ' - Built by The Forge' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Add Claude Code GitHub Action workflow', content: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.claudeYmlB64 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Add CLAUDE.md with full PRD-derived design system and spec', content: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.claudeMdB64 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.issueTitle, body: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.issueBody, labels: ['product-agent'] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: $json.agentName, voice_id: $json.voiceId, response_engine: { type: 'retell-llm', llm_id: null }, agent_prompt: $json.scriptContent, language: 'en-US', voice_temperature: 0.7, responsiveness: 0.8, interruption_sensitivity: 0.6, enable_backchannel: true, boosted_keywords: $json.boostedKeywords }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ area_code: 415, inbound_agent_id: $json.retellAgentId || null, outbound_agent_id: $json.retellAgentId || null }) }}

parameters.body: ={{ 'name=' + encodeURIComponent($('Step 4.7a - Prepare Stripe Tiers').first().json.tiers[1].name) + '&metadata[business_id]=' + encodeURIComponent($('Step 4.7a - Prepare Stripe Tiers').first().json.businessId) + '&metadata[tier]=pro' }}

={{ 'name=' + encodeURIComponent($('Step 4.7a - Prepare Stripe Tiers').first().json.tiers[2].name) + '&metadata[business_id]=' + encodeURIComponent($('Step 4.7a - Prepare Stripe Tiers').first().json.businessId) + '&metadata[tier]=shop' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ launched_at: new Date().toISOString(), repo_url: 'https://github.com/Sluice-Organization/' + $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.repoName, repo_name: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.repoName, status: 'deploying', retell_agent_id: $json.retellAgentId || null, retell_voice: $json.voiceName || null, retell_phone_number: $json.retellPhoneNumber || null, site_url: $json.siteUrl || null, cal_booking_url: $json.bookingLink || 'https://cal.com/shalinp', stripe_price_solo: $json.stripe_price_solo || null, stripe_price_pro: $json.stripe_price_pro || null, stripe_price_shop: $json.stripe_price_shop || null }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'success', message: 'Birth Protocol complete for ' + $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.businessName, businessId: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.businessId, repoUrl: 'https://github.com/Sluice-Organization/' + $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.repoName, issueUrl: $('Step 4 - Create Build Issue').first().json.html_url || 'created', hasPrd: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.hasPrd, retellAgentCreated: $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.retellCreated || false, retellAgentId: $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.retellAgentId || null, retellError: $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.retellError || null, stripePrices: { solo: $('Step 4.7h - Collect Stripe Price IDs').first().json.stripe_price_solo || null, pro: $('Step 4.7h - Collect Stripe Price IDs').first().json.stripe_price_pro || null, shop: $('Step 4.7h - Collect Stripe Price IDs').first().json.stripe_price_shop || null }, steps: { repoCreated: true, claudeActionAdded: true, claudeMdAdded: true, buildIssueCreated: true, retellAgentCreated: $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.retellCreated || false, stripeProductsCreated: true, knowledgeGraphUpdated: true } }) }}
